narrative:
Precinct N. Ridgeville 4-B (precinct in Lorain County) has 742 registered voters, with 58.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.9%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.9 percentage points.
